title: Everbuild Stain Block – Highly Pigmented – Easy to Use – White – 400ml
features: PIGMENTED – This white block spray contains a heavily pigmented white paint with no show-through and easy coverage.
EXCELLENT COVERAGE – Permanently prevents existing stains including water marks, mould stains, rust, nicotine, grease, soot, and stubborn pen marks.
EASY TO APPLY – This white stain blocker paint has an easy application aerosol formula.
VERSATILE – Suitable for most types of household and commercial surfaces.
description: From the manufacturer HOW TO APPLY? Shake the can until a rattling noise is heard then shake for a further 1-2 minutes to mix the paint. Spray Stain Block onto the affected area from a distance of 20-30cm until stain is completely covered. Let dry for 15 mins. If using solvent-based paint, apply a water-based primer first to ensure compatibility with the Stain Block. If caused by leaks or damp, fix the source first. For mould, clean with 404 Fungicidal Wash and let dry before applying. EVERY ROOM IN YOUR HOUSE KEEP YOUR WALLS AND CEILINGS LOOKING FLAWLESS WITH EASE The video showcases the product in use.
